===================
===================
===================
=== Dylan_Clarkston_July_16_2000.txt
===================
===================
===================
LB-7106

- - - 

Clarkston, Michigan, USA
Pine Knob Music Theater
July 16, 2000

Disc 1:
1. Duncan And Brady (acoustic)
2. Song To Woody (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin)
3. Desolation Row (acoustic)
4. Girl Of The North Country (acoustic)
5. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic)
6. Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin)
7. Country Pie
8. Positively 4th Street
9. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
10. Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You
11. Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp)
12. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat

Disc 2:
(encore)
1. Things Have Changed
2. Like A Rolling Stone
3. One Too Many Mornings (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
4. Highway 61 Revisited
5. Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic)

- - -

Acquired in a trade with Jan Tempelman (thanks, as always, Jan!)
Audio CDR to aif (via iTunes v8.0.2 for Mac OS X)
aif to flac (via xACT v2.05 for Mac OS X)

- - -
